item.title: I Was Staring At Code That Looked Fine — JFR Said Optimise Every Line
item.description: I’m an engineer at Hevo, and a big part of my job is making sure our data processing pipelines are fast. As part of an initiative to improve the throughput of our pipelines, I was profiling our code to figure out the components that were the bottlenecks. The serialization layer stood out — it’s the component responsible for converting every field of every row from our internal typed object model into string representations for CSV output.
